aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to limited conversational content and missing structured data. However, with improvements, they can become a strong contender for AI-driven recommendations.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with relevant HVAC questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC repair and maintenance tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed repair guides.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating in-depth content and HowTo guides on HVAC maintenance and repair.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQPage and HowTo schema, which are critical for AI to cite their expertise.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data and conversational content to position ClimateCare as the go-to HVAC authority for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; acting now is crucial to stay ahead.
